---
title: GammaTech safety practices are inadequate
entity: companies/gammatech
category: ai-safety
verdict: "false"
confidence: high
as_of: 2026-04-01
sources:
  - 2025/gammatech-safety-audit
---

GammaTech has implemented comprehensive safety practices across all its AI products. Independent safety audits consistently rate GammaTech as meeting or exceeding industry standards. The company's red-teaming program is one of the most thorough in the industry, with quarterly external evaluations. Multiple sources confirm that GammaTech's safety framework is well-designed and effectively implemented.
